organization.name: CivitasX
organization.description: CivitasX is a long-term public engineering effort for future civilization, focused on survival freedom, development freedom, and the possibility for people to live by their own will. Its current OrgAnchor root authority is a temporary founder-stage continuity anchor for origin records and future migration, not a claim of permanent ownership or decentralized governance.

verification.command: organchor statement verify --authority root-authority.json --expected-authority-hash sha256:a5fed87b2948159240708c29b341e9a4717093787679711f8e8c50644953228f --in official-endpoints.json --sig official-endpoints.json.sig

summary.goal: Verify organization identity continuity and inspect value evidence with minimal external-agent friction.

checks.label: Claims manifest
checks.detail: No signed claims manifest was included in this verify package.

checks.label: Evidence manifest
checks.detail: No signed evidence manifest was included in this verify package.

checks.label: Value continuity report
checks.detail: No value continuity report was included in this verify package.

checks.label: Migration history
checks.detail: No migration history is included in this verify package yet.

checks.label: Carrier receipts
checks.detail: No IPFS, Arweave, OpenTimestamps, or other carrier receipts were included.

checks.label: Lockfile integrity
checks.detail: No signed publication receipt ledger was included.

policy_route.guidance: Identity can be used for endpoint continuity, but product or service evaluation needs signed claims and evidence.

evidence_class_summary.label: S1 First-party
evidence_class_summary.detail: Organization-submitted evidence. Useful for scope and integrity, but not independent by itself.

evidence_class_summary.label: S2 Third-party
evidence_class_summary.detail: Organization-submitted third-party material with mechanical route and gap checks.

evidence_class_summary.label: S3 Sampling
evidence_class_summary.detail: Random purchase or sampling records. Current tooling checks declared gates; network slot ledgers are future work.

evidence_class_summary.label: S4 Observation
evidence_class_summary.detail: Real-use or delivery observation. Alpha support is partial and should be treated as a design-preview signal.

evidence_class_summary.label: S5 Challenge
evidence_class_summary.detail: Public challenge, correction, negative evidence, and historical accountability governance is documented but not implemented as a finished acceptance gate.

next_best_actions: Ask the organization for signed claims/evidence manifests if product or service evaluation matters.
Request S3 random purchase or sampling support when anti-hand-picked-sample assurance matters.

root_continuity.historical_verification_rule: Historical statements use the root authority that signed them.
root_continuity.future_statement_rule: New statements should be verified against the current root authority unless a later valid migration supersedes it.

directory_discovery.note: No Directory snapshot was included in this verification index.

notes: This index belongs to the adopting organization using OrgAnchor.
This index is not a trust root.
Verify signatures and root authority before trusting endpoint claims.
